samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter to keep track of input data.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg type="explicit" id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]" description="Counter to keep track of input data.">0</reg>
            <always>
                <if description="Reset condition">
                    <cond>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <input id="rst_n"/>
                                <bit>0</bit>
                            </equal>
                        </and>
                    </cond>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>cnt</id>
                            <value>4'b0000</value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <cond>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <input id="din_valid"/>
                                <bit>1</bit>
                            </equal>
                            <not>
                                <equal>
                                    <id>cnt</id>
                                    <value>4'b1000</value>
                                </equal>
                            </not>
                        </and>
                    </cond>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>cnt</id>
                            <value>
                                <plus>
                                    <id>cnt</id>
                                    <value>4'b0001</value>
                                </plus>
                            </value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg type="explicit" id="dout_valid" width_description="[7:0]" description="Valid output signal for parallel output data.">0</reg>
            <always>
                <if description="Reset condition">
                    <cond>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <input id="rst_n"/>
                                <bit>0</bit>
                            </equal>
                        </and>
                    </cond>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>dout_valid</id>
                            <value>
                                <bit>0</bit>
                            </value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <cond>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <id>cnt</id>
                                <value>4'b1000</value>
                            </equal>
                            <equal>
                                <input id="din_valid"/>
                                <bit>1</bit>
                            </equal>
                        </and>
                    </cond>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>dout_valid</id>
                            <value>
                                <bit>1</bit>
                            </value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>dout_valid</id>
                            <value>
                                <bit>0</bit>
                            </value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg type="explicit" id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]" description="Parallel output data.">0</reg>
            <always>
                <if description="Reset condition">
                    <cond>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <input id="rst_n"/>
                                <bit>0</bit>
                            </equal>
                        </and>
                    </cond>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>dout_parallel</id>
                            <value>
                                <bit>0</bit>
                            </value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <cond>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <id>cnt</id>
                                <value>4'b1000</value>
                            </equal>
                            <equal>
                                <input id="din_valid"/>
                                <bit>1</bit>
                            </equal>
                        </and>
                    </cond>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <id>dout_parallel</id>
                            <value>
                                <shift>
                                    <input id="dout_parallel"/>
                                    <value>
                                        <bit>0</bit>
                                    </value>
                                </shift>
                                <value>
                                    <input id="din_serial"/>
                                </value>
                            </value>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
